summary: Comprehensive testing of Recurring Deposit (RD) system completed. All 23 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend RD page, Create RD modal, Dashboard RD banner, and Admin RD page all working correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: ✅ Backend: All RD APIs working correctly - interest rates, create, list, details, deposit, withdraw, migration, admin endpoints
✅ Interest calculation uses quarterly compounding formula as specified
✅ MongoDB _id properly excluded from API responses (line 334, 791)
✅ Frontend: RD page displays summary, interest rates, create modal, RD cards correctly
✅ Dashboard: RD banner with emerald color, NEW badge, 9.25% interest rate, navigates to /recurring-deposit
✅ Admin: RD management page shows stats, RD table, Process Interest and Check Matured buttons
✅ All data-testid attributes present: create-rd-btn, monthly-deposit-input, confirm-create-rd-btn, rd-card-*, withdraw-btn-*, rd-banner
seed_data_creation: Used existing test user 'elite-test-user-123' with active RD 'RD-2026-C5201C'
context_for_next_testing_agent: RD system fully implemented and tested. Test user 'elite-test-user-123' has one active RD (RD-2026-C5201C) with 12-month tenure at 8.5% p.a., ₹5,100 deposited. All backend APIs verified: GET /api/rd/interest-rates, POST /api/rd/create, GET /api/rd/list/{user_id}, GET /api/rd/details/{rd_id}, POST /api/rd/withdraw/{rd_id}, POST /api/rd/migrate-from-luxury/{user_id}, GET /api/rd/admin/all, POST /api/rd/admin/process-daily-interest, POST /api/rd/admin/check-matured. Frontend pages: /recurring-deposit (user), /admin/recurring-deposits (admin).

backend_apis: POST /api/rd/create - Creates RD with validation (tenure, min deposit 100 PRC)
GET /api/rd/list/{user_id} - Lists user RDs with summary
GET /api/rd/details/{rd_id} - Returns detailed RD info with premature withdrawal calculation
POST /api/rd/migrate-from-luxury/{user_id} - Migrates Luxury Life savings to 12-month RD
GET /api/rd/admin/all - Admin view with stats and pagination
POST /api/rd/admin/check-matured - Check and notify matured RDs
frontend_pages: /recurring-deposit - RD summary, interest rates, create RD modal, RD accounts list
/admin/recurring-deposits - Admin RD management with stats and actions
features_verified.dashboard_banner: Emerald RD banner with NEW badge, navigates to /recurring-deposit
